description: Trolley bus Good clock on trolleybus connections and sensible lines
S-Bahn Good S-Bahn connections to all corrections, good pace to the wine country.

Inclusive to parents, disabled and old people The bus has a space where parents can leave the uncomfortable child carriages, for old people to sit and for wheelchairs. This should be strengthened, inclusion is key for people to receive the public transport as a good way of moving around. In tram stations but not aa spacious as in the bus.

Bike lanes are respected Bikes are one the most sustainable ways of moving, it should be respected and encouraged. Even tho there are some bike lanes and this survey is about public transport, i think bike lanes should be more supported in this Grüze area. It could be maybe strengthened if there were more bike lanes connecting the old town of Winterthur with the Hegi area. And a recreational area for biking (like bmx)

Future networking opportunities close to bus lines New networking opportunities make the people want to go out more and use this area, easily using more the public transport and less the car, liberating the space that they need in the streets. This would make the flow of buses more punctual. More investments in open spaces, green spaces, parks, cafes, bars, restaurants, etc. Places where people enjoy being, rather than just an industrial gray area.
Juhuuu the barrier is up, fortunately I don't have to take the transfer.  Maintaining the barrier, as the route to the station is extremely shortened compared to the overpass.
Large windows for observing landscapes
plenty of space in the trains It is pleasant and comfortable Also offer long trains at marginal times and do not shorten Partially at marginal times
On time Bus arrivals and departments on time even on a rainy weather
Heating works very well It got very windy, rainy and cold fast Outside and the busdriver instantly turned on the heating, that works well

Bus stop very well delineated Its very important because the people need to know at which position to expect the bus. It makes the exchange of passengers more efficient. Preserved respecting the position, think as a fitting and spread along the lines.

Buses respect their distances 3 buses waiting to leave and pick up passgers, event though they are late, still don't rush and respect their turns and distances. I don't think it can be strengthened anymore, that's swiss culture.
Pedestrian crossings at both sides of bus stop You can cross safely once getting off the bus, or going to the stop Not changing it
Estimated arrival time at bus stops I can estimate an exact time of arrival Keep as is On trains
Seats are usually very clean and in good condition Sitting on dirty seats is unpleasant Clean well Mostly in all trains relatively solid
Bus Its my favorite bus and it drives in a really good frequency. The politicaless of the staff. Every day
Windows are usually clean and not scratched If you want to look out the window, clean windows are important. Window nice cleaning from the inside and outside In most trains
Nice view There is a nice view from the bus. Nothing Not really that-s normal in Switzerland.
Good fast connections from grüze directly to zürich
Stop Storchenbrücke stands on the side where nobody lives.. Place there is sufficient after turning the line 4. Crossing the road is long and dangerous for pedestrians.
alternative place for bus stop Storchenbrücke line 4 on the side where the passengers live.

Charging cable station for phone Because you can always use it. Nowadays you are very much at mobile. Especially in the evening when it is already dark I appreciate such stations very Not everytime the station is working More checking And more of that station in the bus. Often there are know who or less At the evening after work and low battery I approach it

Punctual bus Because I get to my destination on time And it's cold outside and so I have to freeze I guess the bus arrives in time Couldnt been better Just happy how it is Often the bus is coming at correct time
Local train S-Bahn from Winterthur to Winterthur Grüze super on time Allows punctual arrival to destiny Keep infrastructure and operations management intact
There's still room It's very quiet Maintaining Moral Practices Mostly in trains that are not too crowded
Delays are made transparent you know what's going on and how much delay the train has continue to communicate well and be honest time and again in everyday life

Animals are allowed in public transport and keepers ensure that the animals behave properly I find this very tolerant from the SBB Do not introduce any animal bans I keep seeing animals in public transport and there have never been any problems

even if it gets tight everything will remain respectful and do not need too much space for legs, backpacks, etc because the space is limited and you don't have to make yourself unnecessarily wide consider other guests in public transport almost daily at peak times
On Time, not too packed I的m in the office in 30min. Really spontaneous with great connection Everything was good

Ticket devaluer right next to the ramp for underpass The ticket evaluation works so smoothly even if you have to stress on the train. Maybe second evaluator on the other side if one breaks. At other stations you have to walk a bit along the Perron to the next dewerter. At the station Winterthur one was already broken and you had to go to the next one.

looks good

White walls The knowledge walls are very meaningful in the underpass as they light up the underpass very strongly with little energy If this looks sterile, you could distribute very small paintings on metal plates on the wall
Bicycle parking system covered bicycle storage system. The system could be made even safer and it definitely needs more parking spaces.
Bicycle parking space a good covered bike parking space. It takes more parking space. The capacity of this storage system is now almost reached. The bicycle storage system could be made even safer.

All buses are punctual. Time of the picture is 08:00, that the buses arrive with punctuality is important because most usera use the public transport to commute to work. Our jobs are dependable of the constant continuity of the buses. Even though they arrive at the estimated time the wait between buses of the same line is between 10 and 20 min, meaning that if an user doesn't catch one, the next one would be too late to get on time to the destination. Same problem applies if one bus is late and 3 buses of the same line arrive with 2 min of difference between each other. Just other bus lines in Winterthur and other cities in Switzerland, only buses though.
the seats are clean I want to sit on clean seats Regular cleaning and mindfulness of passengers daily in train and bus
Underpasses Old Town-Archhöfe Underpass is only useful for passers-by between the old town and Archöfe. The underpass is therefore poorly used.

Traffic creating delays In the picture isn't appreciated, but is a lot of traffic in this area between two gas stations near the shooting range. Every time the bus crosses this roundabout, gets delayed due to the traffic Well the cars going in and out of the gas station and supermarkets create the delays, maybe opening another lane that facilitates the cars leaving Winterthur helps the traffic.

The lower cycling pitches are full. To lift up the bike is laborious. Many would probably put the bike next to the bike places. Offer more ground-level cycling pitches. There are double-storey bicycle parking spaces in many places. Mostly the upper floor is very little used.

Dark non-hospitable area In the basement of the station is this non-hospitable area. Bad light, no seating, no greening or other creative elements. The tables are often stained. The area does not invite you to linger. With an upgrade, e.g. a soft renovation.

Pre Information about bus departments When you arrive by train, it is difficult to get a quick overview of the departing buses. If you have little time this can be crucial Let the departures in the next 2' appear significantly larger on the screen. so you will be pointed out faster that you have to hurry and immediately see which edge the bus is driving at
Trucks take space Two trucks (come a third one later) were on the sidewalk and on the place. There unloaded. It has less space to walk and it doesn't feel safe. Make a place to unloed.
Taxis in th way When going to the bus station you always have to walk through these taxis. A bit dangerous and just annoying. Wrong place for them to wait. Move them to a different location!
